pr.title: Record: Single-Pass Packed N-gram + Dirichlet CTW — val_bpb 0.1130 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Prebuild order-13 n-gram tables from 10B tokens into a packed artifact, then use hierarchical Dirichlet CTW smoothing in single-pass eval over a tiny GPT.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training relies on training shards only and validation data is used just for evaluation.
techniques: Packed n-gram artifact with uint16 counts and zstd compression
Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing per order with score-first cache updates
Single-pass sliding-window eval over a vestigial 2-layer GPT with int6 quantization
